summary: Comprehensive testing of Manual Reconciliation Module for Miles Capitals FX Broker. All 22 backend API tests pass. Fixed bulk-reconcile endpoint Body() annotation and frontend field misalignments (PSP, Client, Vendor data display). All reconciliation features verified working.

minor.issue: Required Body() annotation for items parameter to properly accept JSON array body - FIXED

integration_issues.issue: Frontend used wrong field names (our_total/settled_total instead of expected_amount/actual_amount) - FIXED
Frontend used wrong field names (name/our_balance/client_balance instead of client_name/calculated_balance/recorded_balance) - FIXED
Frontend used wrong field names (bank_balance/cash_balance instead of expected_commission/paid_commission) - FIXED

bulk_reconcile.fix_applied: Added Body() annotation to items parameter

tabs_verified: Daily - Shows today's pending items with stats
Bank - Upload form and recent uploads list
Flagged - Shows 4 flagged items with actions
History - Full audit trail with action badges

critical_code_review_comments: Good: All reconciliation endpoints properly authenticated
Good: History/audit trail logging on all reconcile actions
Good: Treasury balance updates on adjustment creation
Minor: Vendor name lookup should use vendor_name field primarily - fixed
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added Body() import and fixed bulk-reconcile endpoint
/app/backend/server.py - Fixed vendor_name lookup in vendor reconciliation
seed_data_creation: Created test bank statement uploads (CSV and Excel) with 3 batches visible in UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reconciliation module fully tested. All 20 features in the test request are working. Bank upload supports CSV/Excel/PDF. Manual matching, quick reconcile, bulk reconcile, flagging, adjustments, write-offs, export, and history all functional. Frontend tabs properly display data from API endpoints after field name fixes.

rca_of_the_issue.bulk_reconcile_422: Backend endpoint used 'items: list' which FastAPI couldn't parse from request body. Fixed by adding Body() annotation: 'items: List[dict] = Body(...)'
rca_of_the_issue.frontend_field_mismatches: Frontend code was written with different field names than actual API responses. Fixed by aligning frontend field names to match backend API response structure.
